recommended_pattern: A campaign story column: problem, maker credibility, product proof, reward logic, delivery confidence, and risk-aware close.

decision_rules.if_platform_chrome: Judge and author only the maker story; do not treat the platform funding header or reward rail as campaign design.
decision_rules.if_reward_complex: Explain tier differences early and preserve the same reward names through the decision path.
decision_rules.if_claim_requires_trust: Show production readiness, testing, and delivery constraints beside the claim they substantiate.

anti_patterns: Borrowing Wadiz platform chrome as though it were maker-authored visual evidence.
Using acid-lime-on-black as the whole campaign identity without product-specific proof.
Using an AI-purple gradient as a replacement for a distinctive product story.
